title: Efficiency, effectiveness, productivity and sustainability
summary: 9609 AS — operational performance measures and sustainable operations.

simpleExplanation.title: Doing things right and well
simpleExplanation.summary: Efficiency minimises waste; effectiveness hits objectives. Productivity measures output per input. Sustainability adds environmental and social limits.

sections.content: **Efficiency vs effectiveness** (4.1.2) is a favourite **9609 distinction**. Apply both to the **case operation**.
